summary: Completed comprehensive testing of AurorAI Intelligent Document Processing engine and governance integration features. All backend AurorAI APIs working correctly (health, schemas, dashboard stats), governance stats endpoint returning combined CompassAI+AurorAI data. Frontend AurorAI page fully functional with Dashboard/Upload/Library tabs. Portfolio page showing 5 detailed case studies with correct tags. Governance Maturity Indicator displaying live stats on homepage.
passed_tests: AurorAI health endpoint (/api/aurora/health) - operational status, version 0.1, pipeline IDP-v1 confirmed
AurorAI schemas endpoint (/api/aurora/schemas) - returns exactly 4 schemas as expected (invoice, contract, insurance_claim, id_card)
AurorAI dashboard stats endpoint (/api/aurora/dashboard/stats) - shows 0 documents, 0 pending reviews, 4 schemas, pipeline IDP-v0.1
AurorAI documents list endpoint (/api/aurora/documents) - working (empty list as expected for new installation)
Governance stats endpoint (/api/governance/stats) - returns combined CompassAI + AurorAI data with all required fields
Combined governance stats shows: 12 controls cataloged, 3 active policies, T0-T3 risk tiers, 4 schemas available
Combined stats calculating total governed items and audit-ready percentage correctly
Homepage loads successfully with governance maturity indicator visible in bottom right corner
Governance indicator displays live stats: Controls cataloged (12), Active policies (3), Risk tiering (T0-T3), Schemas available (4), Items governed (5), Audit-ready (0%)
Navigation includes AurorAI link and is clickable
AurorAI page accessible via /aurora route
AurorAI page shows correct branding and header (AurorAI - Intelligent Document Processing)
AurorAI page has all 3 required tabs: Dashboard, Upload, Library
AurorAI Dashboard tab shows document processing statistics with 4 metric cards
AurorAI Upload tab displays drag-and-drop interface with 'SELECT FILE' button
AurorAI Library tab shows empty state with search functionality
Tab navigation between Dashboard/Upload/Library working correctly
Portfolio page loads and displays exactly 5 case studies as expected
Case studies show correct tags including 'CompassAI', 'AurorAI', 'Agentic AI', 'Financial Services', etc.
Case study 1: 'LLM Customer Service Agent Governance' with CompassAI tag
Case study 2: 'Clinical Trial Document Processing' with AurorAI tag visible
Case studies contain detailed Challenge, Approach, and Outcome sections
All navigation links working correctly between pages
success_percentage: Backend: 100% (23/23 tests passed including new AurorAI tests), Frontend: 100% (22 UI/integration tests passed)
